header.title: Email Administration
header.description: Unified hub for request handling, email configuration, and infrastructure. Manage client communications, template branding, and technical monitoring from a centralized dashboard.

sections.title: Request Management
sections.description: Day-to-day handling of client requests. Job tracking, status pipeline, branded correspondence, team assignment, and bulk operations across all form submission types.

sections.title: Configuration
sections.description: Brand identity, templates, preview, A/B subject lines, recipient groups, and scheduling. Control how emails look and behave without touching code.

sections.title: Infrastructure
sections.description: Technical monitoring and operational tools. API health, delivery logs, configuration versioning, and a comprehensive 21-check security audit.

highlights.title: Branded Correspondence
highlights.description: Send professional reply emails with configurable sections, presets, and live preview.

highlights.title: 7-Layer Security
highlights.description: Rate limiting, CSRF, honeypot, XSS sanitization, Zod validation, API key masking, and env security.

highlights.title: SLA Tracking
highlights.description: Priority-based response times with urgency-specific styling and team routing.

highlights.title: Resend Integration
highlights.description: Production-ready email delivery via Resend API with full delivery pipeline observability.

highlights.title: Role-Based Access
highlights.description: Sections organized by role: Office Staff, Business Admins, Project Leads, and DevOps.

highlights.title: Config-Driven Templates
highlights.description: All brand colors, company details, and SLA settings driven from a single config file, Strapi-ready.
